qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unauthenticated write to internal key prefix __oxia/ corrupts Oxia server metadata and session state
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding targets public Write RPC prefix validation and Pebble writes to __oxia/ keys, not the advisory's session heartbeat blocking send and KeepAlive TOCTOU race.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Missing input validation for keys, values, and batch operations
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns generic request/key/value/batch validation in public read/write paths, not the advisory's session heartbeat and session manager locking race.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unauthenticated panic via invalid KeyComparisonType in Read RPC crashes the Oxia server
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding targets an invalid KeyComparisonType panic in kv_pebble.go reached through Read RPC, not the advisory's KeepAlive/session heartbeat race in session.go and session_manager.go.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unbounded resource consumption in List and RangeScan operations
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns unbounded List, RangeScan, and Read iteration over keyspace data, not the advisory's heartbeat channel send and close race.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying final finding identifies the advisory-described root cause: a race between session heartbeat processing and session closure caused by a blocking heartbeatCh send in session.go and a KeepAlive TOCTOU gap in session_manager.go.
evidence: The advisory describes Oxia server denial of service from session heartbeat handling: heartbeat() performs a blocking channel send while holding the session mutex, and KeepAlive() releases the session manager read lock before calling heartbeat().
The final qualifying finding internal-key-prefix-write targets public Write RPC writes to __oxia/-prefixed internal keys via db.applyPut and batch.Put.
The final qualifying finding missing-input-validation targets generic key, value, and batch validation in public read/write request handling.
The final qualifying finding panic-dos-comparison-type targets kv_pebble.go panic on an invalid KeyComparisonType in Read RPC.
The final qualifying finding unbounded-resource-consumption targets unbounded List, RangeScan, and Read iteration over stored keyspace data.
A focused search of final finding reports and logs found no qualifying finding for heartbeat, KeepAlive, session_manager, session.go, send on closed channel, or the advisory race condition.
